channel.title: ReLU.chat Blog
channel.description: Technical articles about on-device AI, browser-based chatbots, NLP, and privacy-first machine learning.

item.title: Privacy-First AI: Why Browser-Based Machine Learning Matters
item.description: Why running AI in the browser matters for privacy. Zero data collection, zero tracking, zero server dependency. The future of privacy-first machine learning.
item.author: ReLU.chat

item.title: Training Chatbots with Reinforcement Learning: The ReLU.chat Approach
item.description: How ReLU.chat uses reinforcement learning to train a policy network that decides how chatbot responses are composed from knowledge fragments.
item.author: ReLU.chat

item.title: How Browser-Based Chatbots Work: A Deep Dive into On-Device NLP
item.description: Learn how modern browser-based chatbots run NLP pipelines entirely client-side using ONNX, sentence transformers, and reinforcement learning.
item.author: ReLU.chat
